subject: [PATCH v4 05/11] mm: swap in PMD swap entries as whole THPs during swapoff

2026-07-13.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of PMD swap entries during swapoff by allowing them to be swapped in as whole THPs (Transparent Huge Pages). It introduces a new function, `swap_pmd_cache_lookup`, which classifies the swap cache behind a PMD swap entry and determines whether it can be handled at PMD granularity. If not, the entry is split into PTE-level entries using `__split_huge_pmd`. The patch also adds a new function, `unuse_pmd`, to swap in PMD-level swap entries as whole THPs during swapoff. This mirrors the existing `unuse_pte_range` function but operates at PMD granularity.
